text.title: Anchor Diversification Rules Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of `Anchor Diversification Rules` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Exact-match anchor text MUST be ≤ 15% of internal-link anchors pointing to any single target page. Above this cap, dilute with branded / partial-match / generic anchors.

rationale.source: Google Webmaster Guidelines + SEO audit corpus 2024-2026

rule.rationale: Exact-match concentration > 15% triggers algorithmic penalty signals; the 15% cap is empirically safe across audit samples.

rule.statement: Branded anchor text (containing the site / product name) MUST be ≥ 20% of internal-link anchors per target page. Below this floor, internal-link profile looks penalty-engineered.
rule.rationale: Sites with zero branded anchors look like SEO-engineered networks; branded floor is the natural-link signature search engines expect.

rule.statement: Generic anchor text ('click here', 'learn more', 'read this') MUST be ≤ 30% of internal-link anchors per target page. Above this ceiling, you waste internal-link equity.
rule.rationale: Generic anchors pass equity but no topical signal; 30% ceiling preserves the equity flow without over-spending on signal-free anchors.

rule.statement: Hub-pages MUST have ≥ 5 inbound spoke-links from cluster pages, and spokes MUST link back to the hub with branded or partial-match anchor. Hub-pages with < 5 inbound spokes signal weak cluster cohesion.
rule.rationale: Hub-spoke ratios below 5:1 lose the topical-authority signal; the explicit ratio enforces the cluster shape.

rule.statement: Each anchor-distribution finding in the checklist MUST link to the Search Console / Screaming Frog / Ahrefs report row that surfaced it. Hand-wave findings are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Findings without source links lead reviewers to skip verification; evidence links force the reviewer to read the actual data.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
